name: Hike to the Hörnli hut from Schwarzsee Zermatt

longDescription: Discover Hike to the Hörnli hut from Schwarzsee Zermatt in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Mountain tour
subcategory.description: Discover and book your next mountain adventure here. Switzerland's mountain hiking trails in the difficulty levels T2 and T3 are marked in white-red-white, while the alpine mountain hiking trails (T4) are marked in white-blue-white. On a guided mountain tour you can explore unknown terrain that would be too dangerous on your own. Mountain tours are offered in Switzerland wherever you encounter high alpine mountains.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Hike to the Hörnlihütte in Zermatt, spectacular mountain landscape and mountain hut for hikers.
Hoernlihütte: Hike to the mountain hut with a view of the Matterhorn in the Alps.
Hoernlihütte: Ski lodge in the mountains, ideal for adventures and groups in summer.
Hiking at the Matterhorn in winter, discover the snow-covered mountains and the beautiful nature.
Schwarzsee: breathtaking mountain landscape with snow-covered peaks and green valley in Switzerland.
Hiking at Schwarzsee with impressive landscapes and clear views of the mountains.
